title: AI Vaporwave Nostalgia
description: Applies a nostalgic 80s/90s vaporwave aesthetic with neon grid and VHS scanlines.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a 1980s vaporwave aesthetic art piece. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identities, key facial features, pose, and framing. Use a vibrant neon color palette dominated by hot pink, cyan, magenta, and deep purple. Incorporate classic vaporwave elements like a glowing wireframe 3D grid, retro-futuristic grid sunset, Greek statues, tropical palms, and a low-fidelity analog VHS glitch overlay with subtle scanlines. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, natural lighting, realistic colors, monochrome, high realism, bad anatomy, malformed hands, distorted faces, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. synthwave grid, purple night sky...
